mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (
mapper.select: /* on.standard.system.authmenu.selectLevelByMenuList */ SELECT MMA.AUTH_ID AS authId , SMMH.MENU_DIV_CD AS menuDivCd , SMMH.MENU_CD AS menuCd , SMMH.KOR_NM AS korNm , SMMH.PAGE_CL AS pageCl , SMMH.LEVEL AS level , LPAD(SMMH.KOR_NM, CHAR_LENGTH(SMMH.KOR_NM) + (SMMH.LEVEL-1) * 8, ' ') AS levKorNm , SMMH.PAGE_CL AS pageCl , SMMH.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , MMA.READ_YN AS readYn , MMA.WRITE_YN AS writeYn , MMA.UPDATE_YN AS updateYn , MMA.DELETE_YN AS deletYn , MMA.POPUP_OPEN_YN AS popupOpenYn , MMA.POPUP_READ_YN AS popupReadYn , MMA.POPUP_WRITE_YN AS popupWiteYn , MMA.POPUP_UPDATE_YN AS popupUpdateYn , MMA.POPUP_DELETE_YN AS popupDeleteYn FROM SVI_MENU_MNG_HIERARCHY SMMH LEFT JOIN STB_M_MENU_AUTH_MNG MMA ON SMMH.MENU_CD = MMA.MENU_CD WHERE SMMH.PAGE_CL != 'ROOT' AND SMMH.MENU_DIV_CD = #{menuDivCd} AND MMA.AUTH_ID = #{authId} ORDER BY SMMH.SORT_PATH
